motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution:

```python
class RecentCounter:
    def __init__(self):
        self.count = 0

    def ping(self, t: int) -> int:
        if t < self.count:
            self.count = t
        return self.count - t
```

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(1)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
